nodes.name: creating-synapses.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide for creating Archon cognitive synapses covering synapse anatomy, core vs optional types, SYNAPSE.md authoring, manifest.yaml format, firing phase design, resources, validation, a step-by-step tutorial, best practices, and full examples for metacognition, security-awareness, and pattern-recognition synapses.

nodes.name: faq.html
nodes.summary: HTML documentation page for Archon FAQ, rendered from faq.md for web-based viewing.

nodes.name: faq.md
nodes.summary: Frequently asked questions for Archon covering general concepts, skills, bundles, pipelines, complexity router, knowledge sources, self-customization skills, prompt library, SDK, admin dashboard, contributing, guardrails engine, synapses, hook system, and pipeline engine for v2.0.

nodes.name: getting-started.html
nodes.summary: HTML documentation page for getting started with Archon, rendered from getting-started.md for web-based viewing.

nodes.name: getting-started.md
nodes.summary: Getting started guide for Archon covering prerequisites, installation steps, creating your first skill using the skill factory or manually, using bundles and pipelines, knowledge sources, self-customization, SDK usage, next steps, and v2.0 features including guardrails and sequential thinking.

nodes.name: guardrails.md
nodes.summary: Archon v2.0 guardrails guide documenting the anti-rationalization synapse with 10 iron laws and forbidden phrases, hook system (pre_step, post_step, on_failure, on_deviation), the STOP-DOCUMENT-ASK-LOG deviation protocol, agent manifest guardrail authoring, and schema reference.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Documentation site entry point HTML file that redirects or serves as the root page for the Archon documentation. Minimal 13-line file.

nodes.name: integration-catalog.html
nodes.summary: HTML documentation page for the Archon integration catalog, rendered from integration-catalog.md for web-based viewing.

nodes.name: integration-catalog.md
nodes.summary: Guide for the Archon MCP integration catalog covering server entry format, required and optional fields, CLI commands for listing/searching/recommending/installing catalog entries, MCP config format for Claude Code, how recommendations work, adding custom servers, and troubleshooting.

nodes.name: llms-txt.html
nodes.summary: HTML documentation page for Archon's llms.txt feature, rendered from llms-txt.md for web-based viewing.

nodes.name: llms-txt.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for Archon's llms.txt and llms-full.txt generation, explaining the standard, what each file contains, how to generate using CLI or standalone script, deployment locations, and validation.

nodes.name: pipeline-orchestration.md
nodes.summary: Archon v2.0 pipeline orchestration guide covering running pipelines via CLI and trigger phrases, YAML format, state management with PipelineState, artifact validation, failure handling strategies (halt/skip/loop), resuming paused pipelines, and context curation between steps.

nodes.name: platform-guide.html
nodes.summary: HTML documentation page for the Archon platform guide, rendered from platform-guide.md for web-based viewing.

nodes.name: platform-guide.md
nodes.summary: Platform guide for Archon documenting the supported Claude Code platform, installation instructions, how the skill system works within Claude Code, verification steps, and the SDK as an alternative integration path.

nodes.name: sequential-thinking.md
nodes.summary: Archon v2.0 sequential thinking guide covering the four phases (Decompose, Reason, Validate, Synthesize), THINKING block format rules, thinking trace schema, BrowseComp reasoning pattern (Detect/Hypothesize/Enumerate/Verify/Continue), complexity scaling, and pipeline integration.

nodes.name: styles.css
nodes.summary: CSS stylesheet for the Archon HTML documentation site, providing visual design, layout, typography, and component styling. Large stylesheet (1142 lines) covering all documentation page appearances.
